title: corybas crenulatus
intro: Corybas crenulatus, also known as the helmet orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid found in Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Corybas crenulatus can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine. However, due to its rarity and endangered status, the harvesting and use of Corybas crenulatus are heavily regulated and subject to conservation efforts.
